overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark, foggy forest at night, illuminated only by a flashlight beam cutting through thick mist. The footage appears to be from a horror video game, featuring dense trees and tall grass lining a narrow dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark foggy forest trail with dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the foggy forest, sweeping the flashlight beam across the path ahead to navigate the darkness

entered.detail: slender deciduous tree trunks lining the left side of the path, disappearing into the fog
cluster of tree trunks on the right side, partially illuminated by the flashlight
thick white mist hovering at ground level, obscuring the distant path
narrow dirt trail with tall grass and undergrowth on either side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow forest path enveloped in thick fog and darkness. A flashlight beam illuminates the immediate ground and surrounding tree trunks while tall grass lines both sides of the trail. The atmosphere is tense and isolated, with no other entities visible in the misty woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression through a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded forest that maintains a sense of oppressive isolation. It begins by moving forward along a narrow dirt path, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the thick darkness to reveal the immediate ground. As the camera advances, the light flickers across the rough textures of surrounding tree trunks and the tall grass lining the trail. The scene continues to push deeper into the misty woods, with the limited visibility intensifying the feeling of solitude before the path stretches further into the gloom.
